name: ChatGPT Images: Download Current Rendered Image
description: Operate on the currently visible ChatGPT Images result in the active tab, open the rendered image, and trigger the save/download control without navigating away.

help.summary: Download the currently visible rendered ChatGPT Images result from the active authenticated ChatGPT tab.
help.returns: The active tab URL, page title, selected image URL, and save/download label from the clicked control.
notes: Use this after a ChatGPT Images result is already visible in the current tab.
The save/download click uses explicit CDP eval because browser downloads commonly require a trusted gesture.

browser_automation.description: Current-tab rendered-image save flow for ChatGPT Images.

sequences.name: chatgpt_images_download_current_rendered
sequences.description: Use the already rendered ChatGPT image card in the current tab and trigger browser save/download.

steps.name: Allow the rendered image surface to settle
Open the visible rendered image and click save/download
steps.script: const sleep=(ms)=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms)); const normalize=(v)=>(v||'').replace(/\u00a0/g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim(); const visible=(n)=>!!(n&&n instanceof Element&&getComputedStyle(n).visibility!=='hidden'&&getComputedStyle(n).display!=='none'&&n.getBoundingClientRect().width>0&&n.getBoundingClientRect().height>0); const labelText=(node)=>normalize([node?.getAttribute?.('aria-label')||'',node?.getAttribute?.('title')||'',node?.getAttribute?.('data-testid')||'',node?.textContent||''].join(' ')).toLowerCase(); const imageUrl=(img)=>{const srcset=String(img.getAttribute('srcset')||'').split(',').map((p)=>p.trim()).filter(Boolean); const srcsetUrl=srcset.length?srcset[srcset.length-1].split(/\s+/)[0]:''; const raw=img.currentSrc||img.src||img.getAttribute('src')||srcsetUrl||''; try{return raw?new URL(raw,window.location.origin).toString():'';}catch{return raw;}}; const score=(img)=>{const w=img.naturalWidth||img.width||img.clientWidth||0; const h=img.naturalHeight||img.height||img.clientHeight||0; return w*h;}; const candidates=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('img')).filter((img)=>img instanceof HTMLImageElement&&visible(img)).filter((img)=>{const url=imageUrl(img); if(!url||/^data:/i.test(url)||/avatar|profile|favicon|icon|emoji|spinner|loading/i.test(url)) return false; return score(img)>=60000;}).sort((a,b)=>score(b)-score(a)); if(!candidates.length) throw new Error('No rendered ChatGPT image found in current tab'); const img=candidates[0]; img.setAttribute('data-rzn-chatgpt-rendered-image','1'); try{img.scrollIntoView({block:'center',inline:'center'});}catch{} const clickNode=(node)=>{ if(!node) return false; try{ if(typeof node.scrollIntoView==='function') node.scrollIntoView({block:'center',inline:'center'}); }catch{} try{ if(typeof node.click==='function'){ node.click(); return true; } }catch{} try{ node.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click',{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,view:window})); return true; }catch{return false;} }; clickNode(img); await sleep(900); const saveButton=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, [role="button"], a')).filter(visible).find((node)=>{const label=labelText(node); return /save|download/.test(label)&&!/share|copy link|twitter|x\.com|export/.test(label);}); if(!saveButton) throw new Error('Rendered image viewer save/download button not found'); saveButton.setAttribute('data-rzn-chatgpt-rendered-save','1'); clickNode(saveButton); return {url:window.location.href,title:document.title,image_url:imageUrl(img),save_label:labelText(saveButton)};
